title: viola gmeliniana
intro: Viola gmeliniana, also known as Gmelin's violet or Chinese heartleaf, is a species of flowering plant in the genus Viola, commonly found in China and parts of Russia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Viola gmeliniana include reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and relieving symptoms of bronchitis and pneumonia. Viola gmeliniana can be prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, and it is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to make decoctions and tonics.
